meta.name: scalar-kuiper
meta.description: BubblePlanner — voice-first task manager with deadline columns, status toggles, multilingual support

files.src/main.jsx:
import { StrictMode } from 'react'
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import './index.css'
import App from './App.jsx'

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <App />
  </StrictMode>,
)

// Category name translations — keyed by a canonical internal key.
// Each entry lists all known variants (in any language) plus the display name per language.
const CATEGORY_MAP = [
    {
        variants: ['покупки', 'shopping', 'сатып алу', 'магазин'],
        en: 'Shopping', ru: 'Покупки', kk: 'Сатып алу'
    },
    {
        variants: ['работа', 'work', 'жұмыс', 'job', 'раб'],
        en: 'Work', ru: 'Работа', kk: 'Жұмыс'
    },
    {
        variants: ['дом', 'home', 'house', 'үй', 'уборка'],
        en: 'Home', ru: 'Дом', kk: 'Үй'
    },
    {
        variants: ['здоровье', 'health', 'денсаулық', 'медицина'],
        en: 'Health', ru: 'Здоровье', kk: 'Денсаулық'
    },
    {
        variants: ['дети', 'kids', 'children', 'child', 'балалар', 'ребен'],
        en: 'Kids', ru: 'Дети', kk: 'Балалар'
    },
    {
        variants: ['финансы', 'finance', 'finances', 'қаржы', 'деньги', 'money'],
        en: 'Finance', ru: 'Финансы', kk: 'Қаржы'
    },
    {
        variants: ['общее', 'general', 'жалпы', 'other', 'другое'],
        en: 'General', ru: 'Общее', kk: 'Жалпы'
    },
];

/**
 * Returns the translated display name of a category for the given language.
 * If the category is a known standard one (matched case-insensitively), it returns
 * the localized name. Otherwise returns the original string unchanged.
 */
export function getCategoryName(lang, rawName) {
    if (!rawName) return rawName;
    const lower = rawName.trim().toLowerCase();
    const match = CATEGORY_MAP.find(c => c.variants.some(v => v === lower));
    if (!match) return rawName; // custom / unknown category — show as-is
    return match[lang] || match.en || rawName;
}

export const getTranslation = (lang, key) => {
    return translations[lang]?.[key] || translations.en[key] || key;
};
